These models are not officially affiliated with  Hololive Production or COVER Corp. The models are created for use in HoloParty, an independent fan-made game project. This projects are not an official Hololive product.
en.about_me:
I am a Software Engineer who likes Game Development, 3D Modeling and Animation.
 I like developing projects, understanding how things happen and the different ways to create something.
en.q: Q: Do you Have A Job Preference?
en.Q2: Q: Since When do you program?
en.Q3: Q: What Languages do you speak?
en.A1: A: Yes. Programming, but I would totally work with 3D!
en.A2: A: Started in 2023 as a hobby and 2025 as a career
en.A3: A: Portuguese, English, Japanese and Spanish.

pt-br.about_me:
Eu sou um Desenvolvedor de Software que gosta de Desenvolvimento de Jogos, Modelagem 3D e Animação.
 Gosto de desenvolver projetos, entender como as coisas acontecem e as diversas formas de se fazer algo.
pt-br.q: Q: Você tem uma preferência de trabalho?
pt-br.A1: A: Sim. Programação, mas eu totalmente trabalharia com 3D!
pt-br.A2: A: Comecei em 2023 como hobby e 2025 como carreira
